ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport ID */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league ID */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_types" (
  "betting_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting type */,
  "betting_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the betting type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the betting type */,
  "betting_type_group" TEXT /* Grouping of similar betting types */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the betting type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("betting_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds_providers" (
  "odds_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds provider */,
  "odds_provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the odds provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the odds provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with these odds */,
  "betting_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the betting type for these odds */,
  "odds_value" REAL /* Value of the odds */,
  "odds_provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the odds provider */,
  "odds_status" TEXT /* Status of the odds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the odds were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the odds were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_odds_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("odds_provider_id") REFERENCES odds_providers ("odds_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_betting_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("betting_type_id") REFERENCES betting_types ("betting_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wagers" (
  "wager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user placing the wager */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being wagered on */,
  "betting_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the betting type of the wager */,
  "wager_amount" REAL /* Amount wagered by the user */,
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the odds at the time of the wager */,
  "wager_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the wager was placed */,
  "wager_status" TEXT /* Status of the wager */,
  "wager_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the wager */,
  "payout_amount" REAL /* Payout amount for the wager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wagers_betting_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("betting_type_id") REFERENCES betting_types ("betting_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wagers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wagers_odds_id FOREIGN KEY ("odds_id") REFERENCES odds ("odds_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event for which the result is recorded */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the event */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result */,
  "result_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the user account */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction type */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the wager */,
  "wager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wager made by the user */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result of the wager */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the wager was placed */,
  "betting_history_status" TEXT /* Status of the betting history record */,
  "betting_history_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the betting history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_wager_id FOREIGN KEY ("wager_id") REFERENCES wagers ("wager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the notification type */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_notification_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_type_id") REFERENCES notification_types ("notification_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_types" (
  "notification_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification type */,
  "notification_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the notification type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_type_id")
)
